label: Transparent drizzle droplet motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Drizzle transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete drizzle droplet motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A delicate cluster of coastal morning drizzle droplets suspended on a thin soft-green seaside grass blade and a small wet-stone fragment, pearl-grey highlights, translucent bead edges, subtle wet stone shadows within the subject only, calm refined material texture. Crisp edges, no cast shadow outside the subject.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, droplets, grass blade, and wet-stone detail visible without cropping; elegant quiet silhouette suitable for a productivity design-system motif.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject, no rain cloud, no umbrella, no ocean landscape, no hand, no props, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Drizzle light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Drizzle, derived from a coastal morning drizzle droplet motif: pearl-grey water beads on soft green seaside grass emerging from smooth wet stone.
Canvas: wide 16:9 4K-class design board, polished subtle productivity-system presentation, quiet and highly legible.
Visual system: pearl grey backgrounds, soft green accents, wet stone neutrals, fine drizzle-dot texture, coastal morning clarity, restrained work-focused UI, 8px radius, crisp hairline borders, gentle glassy highlights.
Required visible sections: Morphous Drizzle, Drizzle Droplets, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Palette labels to include where legible: Pearl Grey, Soft Green, Wet Stone, Sea Mist, Droplet Glass, Deep Slate, Tide Foam.
Constraints: no generic blue or purple gradient UI, no saturated neon colors, no dark storm scene, no umbrella, no clouds as the main motif, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Drizzle.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Drizzle dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Drizzle that feels like the light system translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 4K-class design board, polished subtle productivity-system presentation, quiet and highly legible.
Visual system: deep wet-stone and slate surfaces, pearl-grey text, soft green primary actions and focus rings, droplet-glass highlights, coastal morning drizzle texture, restrained work-focused UI, 8px radius, crisp low-contrast borders, gentle glassy highlights.
Required visible sections: Morphous Drizzle, Drizzle Droplets, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Palette labels to include where legible: Deep Slate, Wet Stone, Pearl Grey, Soft Green, Sea Mist, Droplet Glass, Tide Foam.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic black UI, no purple or blue gradient theme, no saturated colors, no stormy rain scene, no umbrella, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Drizzle.
